content:
🔥 GitHub-Store | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a centralized and user-friendly platform for discovering, installing, and managing open-source applications distributed via GitHub releases across multiple operating systems.
✨ Key Features: • Browse and discover open-source apps from GitHub releases • One-click installation of apps • Automatic detection of installable binaries (APK, EXE, DMG, AppImage, DEB, RPM)
📖 Summary: GitHub Store is a cross-platform application store that allows users to discover and install open-source software directly from GitHub releases. It supports automatic detection of various executable formats and provides a streamlined one-click installation process with update tracking.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
